sources.notes: TWSE MIS last-sale z field was blank at retrieval; current reference uses best bid/ask midpoint from the same official quote payload.
Official daily OHLC/volume through latest completed trading day available in endpoint.
Company identity, listing date, capital, shares, executives and website.
Q1 EPS, revenue, operating income, non-operating income and net income in thousands of TWD.
Official P/B snapshot; PE and dividend yield blank because losses/no dividend.
2025 net loss and zero cash/stock dividend distribution.
Company product and news context including AI imaging SoC platform and customer/project claims.
Automotive computer-vision SoC features and target applications including DVR, DMS, BSD, CMS and OMS.

current_price.source: TWSE MIS best bid/ask midpoint (last-sale z field unavailable at retrieval; bid 66.0 / ask 66.5)

market_cap_estimate.source: Derived from TWSE MIS midpoint and TWSE listed-company share count

missing_evidence: 尚未取得完整法說會逐字稿、法人共識、訂單/backlog、客戶導入收入時程與毛利率橋接
尚未建立 DCF/comps 或正式目標價；TWSE P/E 因虧損為空白，P/B 只能作歷史估值快照
尚未取得即時完整委買委賣、逐筆成交、法人/主力籌碼、融資融券與短線擁擠度資料
未使用個人庫存、券商股數、成本或持倉比重；本報告僅採模型投組 100 units 現金基準

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; conditional <=5% only after evidence and trigger clearance
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: 6.7% to 61.8 TWD tactical invalidation level, based on TWSE MIS midpoint reference
portfolio_risk.liquidity_cap: 5% single-name cap binds before ADV in model-portfolio units; exit capacity still requires live depth check
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; size-down/no-position is cleaner than an index hedge because the intended exposure is idiosyncratic small-cap AI imaging SoC momentum.
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Do not open model position until either (1) price consolidates above 62.7/61.8 TWD with volume normalization and revenue/EPS evidence improves, or (2) a close above 68.9 TWD is followed by company-supported order/revenue confirmation, not only narrative momentum.
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: If a post-trigger starter exists, trim/re-underwrite on a close back below 62.7 TWD or if monthly revenue remains negative YoY without offsetting customer/order proof.
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: Exit/watch-only if price breaks 61.8 TWD, May/June momentum fails, or official revenue/EPS path does not validate AI/automotive SoC thesis.
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk now; illustrative post-trigger 5% model position with a 6.7% stop would risk roughly 0.34% of model NAV, below the 0.50% wait-entry risk budget.
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price/volume until momentum cools; monthly revenue after TWSE release; quarterly EPS and margin after next reported quarter.

evidence_confidence: medium: issuer identity, price, revenue and EPS are primary-sourced; thesis conversion, consensus and valuation remain incomplete
underwriting_status: Preliminary watchlist initiation; not decision-ready for model portfolio ownership
